name: E and B Pawnbroker
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in South Jersey since 1973 offering loans, buying/selling, and repair services for jewelry, coins, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
E and B Pawnbroker is a family-owned pawn shop established in 1973, serving South Jersey for nearly 50 years. The business operates from a physical location in Moorestown, NJ and offers online services, positioning itself as a customer-first operation with emphasis on fast and straightforward transactions. The company's longevity in the market and generational ownership model reflect a traditional pawn shop structure adapted for modern consumers.

The company offers collateral-based loans with 90-day terms, outright purchases of items, and sales of pre-owned goods across multiple categories including jewelry, watches, coins, handbags, flatware, electronics, musical instruments, and tools. They also provide item repair services and metal quote assessments for gold, silver, and platinum. Their process includes professional in-person appraisals, quality reviews, and formal agreements before disbursement. The company advertises ability to provide loan funding within minutes.

E and B differentiates itself through emphasis on expert appraisals, fair pricing claims, and personalized customer service. The website highlights their commitment to treating items with care and providing competitive offers. They operate both in-store (Monday-Friday, 8am-5pm) and online channels, allowing customers to get quotes and initiate transactions remotely before shipping items for professional evaluation.

As a traditional pawn operation, E and B serves customers seeking quick access to cash through collateral loans or those looking to sell items. However, the company does not appear to offer credit-building products, credit repair services, or financial counseling. The 90-day loan term and lack of disclosed APR information are standard for pawn operations but represent limited flexibility compared to term loans. Customer reviews visible on the website are limited and repetitive, providing minimal independent validation of service quality.
pros: Nearly 50 years of operating history since 1973 demonstrates business stability
Family-owned structure with stated customer-first philosophy
Fast loan funding claimed in minutes without lengthy approval processes
Expert appraisal process with professional quality review for items
Accepts wide variety of item categories (jewelry, coins, electronics, musical instruments, tools, watches, handbags, flatware)
Offers both loan and outright purchase options with 90-day loan terms
Additional repair services available beyond standard pawn transactions
Online quote system and remote shipping option for convenience
cons: No disclosed APR or interest rates on loan offerings, making cost comparison difficult
Physical location limited to single Moorestown, NJ address despite online presence
Customer testimonials on website appear repetitive (same review repeated multiple times), raising authenticity concerns
No information on loan terms, default policies, or redemption procedures
90-day fixed loan term offers limited flexibility compared to personal loan alternatives
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash and willing to use personal items as collateral
People looking to sell jewelry, coins, watches, or collectibles for fair market value
Customers in South Jersey seeking in-person appraisal and same-day or next-day funding
Those with items needing professional repair services alongside potential sale or loan options
diagnosis: E and B Pawnbroker is best for consumers in South Jersey who own valuable items and need emergency cash quickly, either through collateral loans or outright sales. The main caveat is that pawn loans do not build credit history and lack transparent interest rate disclosure, so borrowers should understand the full cost before pledging items, and this option works best only when immediate cash access outweighs other alternatives.
services: Outright purchase of items with immediate payment
Sale of pre-owned jewelry, watches, coins, and collectibles
Professional in-person item appraisals and evaluations
Gold, silver, and platinum metal quote assessments
